untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) month-end detection and cross-month calculations not available in allowed indicators; (2) dynamic ranking of stocks by monthly returns across universe (requires comparative sorting logic); (3) year-on-year seasonal pattern matching from historical lookback (requires multi-year seasonal decomposition not in indicator set); (4) explicit seasonal calendar logic. The strategy is fundamentally a portfolio-level relative-value and seasonal calendar signal that cannot be expressed as simple bar-level indicator conditions.
translation_notes: This is a universe/portfolio-level seasonal ranking strategy, not a single-instrument technical signal. It requires: (a) monthly rebalancing logic at month-end; (b) cross-sectional ranking of S&P 500 constituents; (c) historical seasonal pattern matching (e.g., 'month X tends to outperform'); (d) state management across months. A minimal approximation using monthly returns has been provided, but does not capture the core seasonal ranking and year-on-year pattern-matching logic. Recommend implementing as custom portfolio strategy outside standard backtest engine.
